what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG checkmark icon using a single stroked path with no fill.
observations: Uses an SVG namespace with viewBox, width, and height set to 24.
Draws the mark with one path: M5 12.5 L10 17 L19 7.
Uses fill="none" and stroke="currentColor" so color inherits from surrounding text or CSS.
Sets stroke width to 1.5 with round line caps and round joins.
standouts: Stroke-only rendering on a 24 by 24 coordinate grid.
conventions: Follows common outline icon conventions: no fill, currentColor stroke, round caps, round joins.
Keeps the SVG self-contained and compact.
Uses a path element rather than a polyline for the check shape.
concerns: No embedded title, role, or aria attributes, so standalone accessible meaning is not present in this file.
notes: A compact reusable checkmark SVG intended to inherit its color from the rendering context.
questions: Is this icon intended to be decorative only, or should accessibility metadata be supplied by the consumer?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename and path indicate a check icon asset, and the file contains a checkmark SVG.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a lightweight checkmark icon that can adapt to surrounding color styles.
contribution: A theme-inheriting checkmark icon asset for affirmative, selected, completed, or validation states.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 stroke-only SVG checkmark icon using currentColor and a single path.
intention_for_embedding: This was for a reusable design-system check icon that inherits color from its usage context.
